gist.headline: Fresh ink on the page
gist.blurb: The automated scribe has updated the README with the latest news from the hive.
gist.summary: Automated update to the README.md news section to reflect recent changes.
gist.impact: Keeps the repository landing page current with the latest project activity.
gist.visual_concept: The Monitor Robot acting as a town crier or posting a notice on a wooden board in the garden. The bee is reading the new notice.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute robot pinning a fresh paper notice to a wooden garden signpost. The bee mascot hovers nearby reading the text. Lime green (#ecf874) and soft pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Pixel font text on sign: 'NEWS'.
